scores.fundamental_detail: PE ~0.9x book (deeply undervalued). NPA cleanup done. Improving profits. Rate-cut tailwind. Govt capital support.
scores.fii_dii_detail: DII net buyers. FII cautious but not selling aggressively. Domestic flows dominant.
scores.notes: NEW ACTIVE SECTOR. Rotating from BANKBEES. Strong turnaround story — PSU banks at multi-year profitability highs. RBI rate cuts directly boost NIM. Govt ownership = capital support.

scores.fundamental_detail: Strong US FDA pipeline, PLI scheme tailwind. Defensive sector — outperforms in uncertainty. Fair valuation ~22x.

scores.notes: Strong #2 score. Active sector allocation goes to PSUBNKBEES (higher score). Existing PHARMABEES holding (2000 units) is fine — HOLD. No new sector allocation this month but if PSUBNKBEES falters, pharma is backup.

scores.fundamental_detail: Govt capex ongoing. National Infra Pipeline. Very cheap PE ~10-12x. Stable earnings.

scores.notes: Strong #3. At 52-week high. CPSEETF has approved instruments list. Could be added to watchlist for next month if PSUBNKBEES falters.

scores.fundamental_detail: Rate cuts are tailwind. Credit growth moderating. Fair PE ~14x. Near-term headwinds from NIM compression during rate cut cycle.
scores.fii_dii_detail: Mixed. FII cautious overall. DII buying on dips. Volume accumulation in April encouraging.
scores.notes: PREVIOUS ACTIVE SECTOR. Score 5.6 = HOLD. Deploy ₹30,000 (half allocation); redirect ₹30,000 to Large Cap. High volume accumulation (1.75x) and strong RSI suggests recovery possible. Monitor for upgrade next month.

scores.fundamental_detail: US tariffs + DOGE cuts = severe headwind for Indian IT revenues. USD weakness reduces INR earnings. Declining earnings trend.
scores.fii_dii_detail: FII net sellers in IT. Sector under institutional distribution.
scores.notes: AVOID — score 2.9 below 4 for first observed month. STOP NEW BUYS immediately. Existing holding 1500 units at 32.23 (current +7.8%). No trailing stop triggered yet (gain <15%). MONITOR: if score stays below 4 next month = recommend exit with trailing stop.

exit_alerts.note: Score below 4 for first time (first run data). Need 2 consecutive months to trigger full exit recommendation. Monitor closely. If Apr score stays below 4 → add trailing stop and prepare exit.

exit_alerts.note: Score dropped to HOLD range. No full exit — banking fundamentals intact. Redirect ₹30,000 savings to Large Cap (NIFTYBEES).

gold_goldbees.signal: Strong uptrend — risk-OFF. Gold at multi-year highs. Supports defensive sector allocation.

global_icicib22.signal: Recovering from Jan spike (146) and Feb crash (118). Nasdaq volatile — tariff uncertainty persists.

fii_dii_apr16.note: Apr 16 FII turned net buyer (382cr) but DII unusual net seller (3427cr). Single-day reversal — monitor trend. Monthly April FII remains net seller.
